author: fdoljanin
body:
# Improve DisplacedParticleGun

#### PR description:

This PR improves the sampling and configuration of `DisplacedParticleGunProducer`.

The particle origin is now sampled at z=0, using either a uniform-area or uniform-radius distribution. The trajectory is then required to cross the configured production region and, when present, an optional target region. Additional geometry checks and constrained direction sampling make failures from incompatible configurations much less likely.

The production-vertex time is calculated from the distance travelled from the origin and the particle velocity, fixing the previous timing offset.

The displaced-particle upgrade workflow now uses the `CloseBy` beam spot instead of `DBrealisticHLLHC`.

The configuration was reorganized to describe the momentum, origin, production region, and optional target region explicitly.

#### PR validation:

- Successfully compiled with `scram b`.
- Passed `scram build code-checks`.
- Passed `scram build code-formats`.
- Generated events with several different configurations without errors.
- Verified that workflow `34554.0` selects `GenSimDisplaced` with the `CloseBy` beam spot.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

This is not a backport.

This PR is part of a summer student project under the supervision of @bfonta.
title: Improving DisplacedParticleGun
